g.text: One screen surfaces every signal — the adjuster reviews and decides. Human-in-the-loop by design.
Receives every claim event (FNOL · document arrival · adjuster action) → activates, sequences, and parallelizes agents.
Stateful per-claim context · retry & fallback policies · observability hooks.
Generates regulatory deadline alerts across all 50 states before any window closes.
Independently deployable · each with a defined job in the claims lifecycle · no shared brain · loosely coupled.
One gateway connects every agent to existing systems. Every interaction is authenticated and logged at this boundary.
AuthN · AuthZ · Rate-limiting · Schema validation · Immutable audit log → your regulatory audit trail
Sits on top of what you already have. No CMS replacement required. No data migration. No re-platforming.
